spl_product_data_elements: DRx Choice DAYTIME COLD AND FLU Acetaminophen, Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide, and Phenylephrine Hydrochloride ACETAMINOPHEN ACETAMINOPHEN DEXTROMETHORPHAN HYDROBROMIDE DEXTROMETHORPHAN PHENYLEPHRINE HYDROCHLORIDE PHENYLEPHRINE FD&C RED NO. 40 FD&C YELLOW NO. 6 GELATIN, UNSPECIFIED GLYCERIN POLYETHYLENE GLYCOL, UNSPECIFIED EICOSYL POVIDONE PROPYLENE GLYCOL SORBITOL SOLUTION TITANIUM DIOXIDE
spl_unclassified_section: TAMPER EVIDENT: This package is safety-sealed & child resistant. Use only if blisters are intact. If difficult to open, use scissors.
Distributed by: Raritan Pharmaceuticals 8 Joanna Court East Brunswick, NJ 08816
active_ingredient: Active ingredients (in each softgel) Acetaminophen 325 mg Dextromethorphan HBr 10 mg Phenylephrine HCl 5 mg
purpose: Purpose Pain reliever/fever reducer Cough suppressant Nasal decongestant
indications_and_usage: Uses temporarily relieves common cold/flu symptoms: â–Ş nasal congestion â–Ş cough due to minor throat & bronchial irritation â–Ş sore throat â–Ş headache â–Ş minor aches & pains â–Ş fever
warnings: Warnings Liver warning: This product contains acetaminophen. Severe liver damage may occur if you take â–Ş more than 8 softgels in 24 hours, which is the maximum daily amount for this product â–Ş with other drugs containing acetaminophen â–Ş 3 or more alcoholic drinks every day while using this product Allergy Alert: Acetaminophen may cause severe skin reactions. Symptoms may include: â–Ş skin reddening â–Ş blisters â–Ş Rash If a skin reaction occurs, stop use and seek medical help right away. Sore throat warning: If sore throat is severe, persists for more than 2 days, is accompanied or followed by fever, headache, rash, nausea, or vomiting, consult a doctor promptly.
do_not_use: Do not use â–Ş with any other drug containing acetaminophen (prescription or nonprescription). If you are not sure whether a drug contains acetaminophen, ask a doctor or pharmacist. â–Ş if you are now taking a prescription monoamine oxidase inhibitor (MAOI) (certain drugs for depression, psychiatric or emotional conditions, or Parkinson's disease), or for 2 weeks after stopping the MAOI drug. If you do not know if your prescription drug contains an MAOI, ask a doctor or pharmacist before taking this product.
ask_doctor: Ask a doctor before use if you have â–Ş liver disease â–Ş heart disease â–Ş high blood pressure â–Ş thyroid disease â–Ş diabetes â–Ş trouble urinating due to enlarged prostate gland â–Ş cough that occurs with too much phlegm (mucus) â–Ş persistent or chronic cough as occurs with smoking, asthma, or emphysema
ask_doctor_or_pharmacist: Ask a doctor or pharmacist before use if you are taking the blood thinning drug warfarin.
when_using: When using this product, do not use more than directed.
stop_use: Stop use and ask a doctor if â–Ş you get nervous, dizzy or sleepless â–Ş pain, nasal congestion or cough gets worse or lasts more than 7 days â–Ş fever gets worse or lasts more than 3 days â–Ş redness or swelling is present â–Ş new symptoms occur â–Ş cough comes back or occurs with rash or headache that lasts. These could be signs of a serious condition.
pregnancy_or_breast_feeding: If pregnant or breast-feeding, ask a health professional before use.
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: Keep out of reach of children.
overdosage: In case of overdose, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away at 1-800-222-1222. Quick medical attention is critical for adults & for children even if you do not notice any signs or symptoms.
dosage_and_administration: Directions â–Ş take only as directed â–Ş do not exceed 8 softgels per 24 hrs adults & children 12 yrs & over 2 softgels with water every 4 hrs children 4 to under 12 yrs ask a doctor children under 4 yrs do not use
dosage_and_administration_table:
adults & children 12 yrs & over2 softgels with water every 4 hrs
children 4 to under 12 yrsask a doctor
children under 4 yrsdo not use
storage_and_handling: Other information â–Ş store at room temperature
inactive_ingredient: Inactive ingredients FD&C Red No. 40, FD&C Yellow No. 6, gelatin, glycerin, polyethylene glycol 400, polyvinyl pyrrolidone, propylene glycol, sorbitol sorbitan anhydrous, titanium dioxide
